design_philosophy: A Swiggy-like hyperlocal platform that doesn't feel like a sterile tech giant. We use 'Organic & Earthy' principles—warm bone-white backgrounds, deep terracotta accents, and soft stone greys. It blends high-end editorial food photography with crisp, functional SaaS elements for the kitchen and admin dashboards.

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-stone-900

buttons.primary: bg-orange-600 text-white hover:bg-orange-700 transition-colors shadow-sm font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 text-stone-800 hover:bg-stone-200 transition-colors px-6 py-3 rounded-full
buttons.outline: border border-stone-300 text-stone-700 hover:border-orange-600 hover:text-orange-600 transition-colors rounded-full px-6 py-3

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-200/60 shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-white border border-stone-300 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-stone-800 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-orange-500/20 focus:border-orange-500 transition-all

header.glassmorphism: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-stone-200/50 supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-white/60

badges.default: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-stone-100 text-stone-800
badges.success: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-100 text-green-800
badges.warning: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-orange-100 text-orange-800
badges.status_preparing: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800

hero_background.description: Wide-angle top-down photograph of a rustic wooden table filled with artisan homemade food bowls, warm golden hour lighting

delivery_agent.description: Delivery agent on a bicycle or scooter in a warm sunny neighborhood

kitchen_chef_1.description: Man holding a white plate, preparing food

kitchen_chef_2.description: Tattooed chef in a white uniform preparing food

food_bowl_1.description: pasta dish on white ceramic bowl

food_bowl_3.description: Hand squeezing lime over shredded carrot salad

food_bowl_4.description: Fresh, delicious granola is served in a white bowl

instructions_to_main_agent: Design files MUST be standard .js (.jsx) and not .tsx since the system uses JS.
Include `data-testid` on ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, badges).
Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing/landing page with generous padding (p-12, gap-16) and avoid generic Shadcn wrappers to allow fluid bento grid layouts.
Use Shadcn UI for Dashboard features (Admin, Kitchen, Delivery) but override generic borders with `border-stone-200` and use `rounded-xl`.
Avoid standard tech gradients; rely on textures, flat colors, and high-quality image backgrounds.
Do NOT use pure #000000. Text should be #2C2724 (stone-900 equivalent). Background should be #FDFBF7 (stone-50 equivalent).
Apply CSS filter on OpenStreetMap/Leaflet components to match the warm theme: `filter: sepia(0.15) contrast(0.95) brightness(1.05) hue-rotate(-10deg);`.
For WebSockets real-time order tracking, add visual feedback such as a subtle `animate-pulse` on the active order state badge or progress bar.
Do not use 'Inter' font. Implement 'Cabinet Grotesk' for display/headings and 'Manrope' for body/forms.
